name: Procore Construction Financials API
what_it_does: Procore Financials REST API for construction financial management within the Procore platform. Enables AI agents to manage project budgets and budget modifications, handle subcontractor contracts and change orders, access owner contracts and billing, retrieve cost codes and job cost tracking, manage subcontractor invoices and payment applications (G702/G703), access financial forecasting and projected final cost, handle lien waivers and compliance documents, retrieve project financial analytics and cash flow data, and integrate construction financials with ERP and accounting systems.
use_cases: Managing project budgets and cost tracking from construction financial automation agents
Processing subcontractor invoices and payment apps from accounts payable agents
Retrieving change order and cost impact data from project controls agents
Integrating construction financials with ERP from enterprise construction agents
not_for: Non-construction industries without project-based budgeting and subcontractor billing needs
Simple invoicing without construction-specific G702/G703 and lien waiver workflows
Real estate development without general contractor and subcontractor financial management
best_when: A general contractor, construction manager, or owner's representative using Procore wants AI agents to automate budget management, subcontractor billing, change order workflows, financial forecasting, and ERP integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Construction financial data includes sensitive contract amounts, margins, and subcontractor payment terms. Automated change order approvals require project manager oversight. Lien waiver automation must comply with state-specific lien laws. Payment application automation must accurately reflect work in place.

auth.notes: Procore uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Project and company-level credentials with financial, document, and project scopes. Excellent developer portal with API explorer. GitHub presence. Webhooks for financial events. Marketplace with 500+ integrations. Strong developer ecosystem.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — construction platform enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Carpinteria, California. NYSE: PCOR. Founded 2002. Dominant construction management platform. $1B+ annual revenue. 14,000+ construction companies. Procore App Marketplace with 500+ integrations. Strong general contractor and owner market. Competes with Autodesk Construction Cloud for construction management.

performance.rate_limits: 3600 requests per hour per OAuth token; documented

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Construction financial data includes sensitive margins — change order automation requires PM approval
Lien waiver compliance varies by state — automation must respect state-specific lien law requirements
Payment application (G702/G703) is a legal document — automated creation requires review before submission
No public MCP server — excellent OAuth2 REST API with comprehensive developer portal and SDK
Project and company scopes are separate — token access must match project hierarchy
Budget modification automation can affect contract values — requires audit trail for compliance
agent_readiness.security_notes: Construction financial and contract data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Project margin sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Construction financial data. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. Multi-region. Contract and margin sensitivity.
